Ajit Goel

Senior Solution Architect • AWS / Java / .NET / Event-Driven Systems

Seattle, WA linkedin.com/in/ajitgoel hellokumarajit@gmail.com

Professional Summary

Senior Solution Architect and platform engineer with 20+ years designing and delivering cloud-native, event-driven distributed systems on AWS using Java/Spring Boot and .NET Core. Architected real-time personalization engines processing 10 TB of health data for 1.8M users, high-throughput content APIs sustaining 5,700 RPS, and a $1.6B fee-billing microservices platform.
